name: io.github.hanabi-jpn/jp-tax-calc
description: Japanese tax calculation and filing support with income tax, consumption tax, corporate tax, furusato nozei, and e-Tax integration

environmentVariables.name: ETAX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: e-Tax API key for direct electronic filing

environmentVariables.name: MYNUMBER_VERIFY_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MyNumber verification API key for identity validation

environmentVariables.name: FREEE_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: freee accounting OAuth access token for importing transaction data

environmentVariables.name: JP_TAX_YEAR
environmentVariables.description: Target tax year for calculations (format: YYYY, default: current year)
